_schema_doc.description: Curated catalog of notable (often violent) scenes per anime, grouped by character on detail pages.

entry_shape.mal_id: MyAnimeList id (number) so we can join to anime data
entry_shape.character: Character name this scene focuses on (used for grouping on detail page)
entry_shape.title: Short scene title
entry_shape.severity: one of: mild | moderate | graphic | extreme
entry_shape.kind: video | image  (defaults to image if omitted)

scenes.title: Eren's first titan transformation
scenes.description: After being swallowed during the Trost breach, Eren erupts from inside a titan's belly. The framing makes the moment feel less like a victory and more like a horror.

scenes.title: The Colossal Titan breaches Wall Maria
scenes.description: The series-defining opening shock: an impossibly large face appears over the wall, kicks the gate in, and unleashes the first wave of titans into a town that thought it was safe.

scenes.title: Carla's final moments
scenes.description: Trapped under the rubble of her home, Carla begs Eren and Mikasa to run as a smiling titan approaches. The camera lingers just long enough.
